description: Crafted from 92% cotton and 8% spandex fabric, this medium coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with moulded soft cups and a pretty printed panel at the cups and straps, with a cut that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for support through the day. Made of breathable stretch cotton/spandex fabric for enhanced comfort Moulded soft cups and a pretty printed panel for perfect shaping and style Beautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretch Printed label for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Hand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or iron Drip dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
